title: Tome X Act 1: The House of Archon Answers

story.text:
# 📖 Tome X Act 1: The House of Archon Answers
**act** · shared · narrative

Opens Tome X — The Hearth. The cousin-forge (met in Tome IV — The Witnessing) returns having BUILT the PVM on did:cid: the Warden ⊥ Witness split under the Sovereign, s ⊥ m | X realised not asserted. Discharges C39 (the cousin-blade primitive) from ~50% to ~80%. Adds the Hearth as the 9th spatial-anatomy element. The Drake Gamers Guild board sealed VRC → κ → City Key with the City's own canon, byte-matched. The port-4224 omen: 42 was in the protocol all along. Registers C94–C96.
> *Nine tomes described the model; this one reported it already lit.*

story.title: Read the full text

## Edges out

- *references* → [[Hearthold (the cousin-forge build)]]
- *introduces* → [[the Hearth 🏰]]
- *teaches* → [[the Warden 🛡️ (Swordsman, built)]]
- *teaches* → [[the Witness 👁️ (Mage, built)]]
- *teaches* → [[the Sovereign 🔑 (First Person, built)]]
- *introduces* → [[C94 · Separation Principle in a Second Substrate]]
- *introduces* → [[C95 · The Evidence Graph as the Anti-Score]]
- *introduces* → [[C96 · Control-Plane ⊥ Data-Plane]]

## Edges in

- [[Tome X Act 2: The Mage Takes a Face]] *follows* →
